name: Cosmoria Harbor Cluster
daily_flows: goods move toward the highest processing capacity available that day
routine people move faster than exceptional cases
rumor outruns freight whenever one node becomes visibly slow
information_movement: Informal certainty moves through workers, clerks, shrine regulars, and repeat carriers before formal notice catches up.
pressure_spillover: When the central node tightens, peripheral nodes absorb delay, improvisation, and second-hand explanation.
feeder_logic: Smaller nodes stabilize the larger node by absorbing overflow, staging movement, and translating local uncertainty into usable sequence.
